inputs.issue_title: Add webhook support for pipeline events
inputs.issue_body: We need to send webhook notifications when pipeline phases complete. Support configurable endpoints per repo, retry logic, and HMAC signing.
inputs.research_context: Webhooks typically use POST with JSON payload. HMAC-SHA256 for signing. Retry with exponential backoff.
inputs.gathered_context: Pipeline phases emit events via traces package. Config struct at config/config.go. No existing webhook code.
inputs.conventions: Zero external dependencies. net/http for HTTP. crypto/hmac for signing.
